title: Cara Semperger
compiled_truth: Cara Semperger is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-05 to 2002-02-08), Cara Semperger sent 470 and received 806 emails, totalling 1276 interactions. Top correspondents: [Donald Robinson](people/donald-robinson) (73), [Diana Scholtes](people/diana-scholtes) (57), [Stacy Runswick](people/stacy-runswick) (53), [Sean Crandall](people/sean-crandall) (50), [Diane Cutsforth](people/diane-cutsforth) (45). Mailbox folders observed: bill_williams_iii, calendar, contacts, deleted_items, inbox, outbox.
